name: Oyster Corn Chowder#3 Tdf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Orzo Pasta, cooked per pkg.
Salt and white pepper, to taste
1 pint Maryland Oysters with their liquor
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the orzo according to the directions on the package and set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the chicken broth, parsley, leeks, prosciutto, salt, and pepper. Simmer until the leeks are tender, about 2 minutes.
3. Add the corn, butter, chipotle powder, cream, and oysters with their liquor to the saucepan. Simmer for 3 to 5 minutes longer.
4. Stir in the cooked orzo and serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
Per Serving: 337 calories, 21 gm protein, 38 gm carbohydrates, 12 gm fat, 5 gm saturated fat, 85 mg cholesterol, 733 mg sodium.
